mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recharge_order (order_no, user_id, package_id, credits, amount_cents, currency, status, channel, stripe_session_id, remark) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{packageId}, #{credits}, #{amountCents}, #{currency}, #{status}, #{channel}, #{stripeSessionId}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no AS orderNo, user_id AS userId, package_id AS packageId, credits, amount_cents AS amountCents, currency, status, channel, stripe_session_id AS stripeSessionId, stripe_payment_intent AS stripePaymentIntent, created_at AS createdAt, paid_at AS paidAt, remark FROM recharge_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
